Annotation.String: Function to find valid Windchill enumerated value pairs. See PTC.EnumType.
This will return a CSRF Token (nonce) for this particular Windchill session.
This will check if particular assembly is installed or not.
Function to get a list of all valid lifecycle states in Windchill.
Function to get locale dependent Windchill metadata for entities and complex types present in a given domain.
Returns a list of Domains that are included in the documentation tool
Return the URL for JWT Form renderer servlet.
Get all domain dependencies as a flat list
Get domains imported by a domain passed as a parameter
This function returns a list of ComplexType, each complex type representing an installed module with its version.
function to get supported WVS features
Function to get preferences for xliff document creation
Gets the valid change link entity type name for affected or resulting or hanging links as per relationship constraint.
Attribute persisted in the database (MBA, and Local/Standard attribute).
Attributes calculated on the fly (SCA), such as Identity. Not persisted.
Custom attributes with formlas, Alias attributes and NPA (such as Change Status).
Property with no corresponding Windchill attribute.
WTUser representation used in ContentItem. Full representation available via Core Links.
Used to configure attribute which is type of String having classification constraint.
A complex type to help acquire a nonce through the use of the /PTC/GetCSRFToken()
Locale dependent metadata for a property.
Locale dependent metadata for a navigation property.
Locale dependent metadata for an entity type.
Used to for Windchill enumerated types. To get the valid legal values call the GetEnumTypeConstraint import function in the entity domain.
Used to for Windchill Quantity Of Measure types.
A generic property that represents a location in space
Used to for Windchill Hyperlink types.
Object that represents an installed windchill assembly
Used for Windchill work in progress state enumerated type.
A complex type to define content input parameter
Function to find valid Windchill enumerated value pairs. See PTC.EnumType.
This will return a CSRF Token (nonce) for this particular Windchill session.
This will check if particular assembly is installed or not.
Function to get a list of all valid lifecycle states in Windchill.
Function to get locale dependent Windchill metadata for entities and complex types present in a given domain.
Function to get locale dependent Windchill metadata for entities and complex types present in a given domain with option to include inherited properties for the entities and complex types.
The fully qualified entity or complex type name
Function to get locale dependent Windchill metadata for a given entity or complex type name.
The fully qualified entity or complex type name
Function to get locale dependent Windchill metadata for a given entity or complex type name with option to include inherited properties for the entity or complex type.
The fully qualified entity or complex type name
Function to get locale dependent Windchill metadata for a given entity or complex type name with option to include inherited properties for the entity or complex type.
Returns a list of Domains that are included in the documentation tool
Return the URL for JWT Form renderer servlet.
Get all domain dependencies as a flat list
Get all domain dependencies as a flat list
Get domains imported by a domain passed as a parameter
Get domains imported by a domain passed as a parameter
This function returns a list of ComplexType, each complex type representing an installed module with its version.
Constraint type applied to this property
Describes the visibility for a property
Describes a single Property for constraints
A list of PropertyItems for constraints
Function to find the Driver Attributes for a Windchill type
Function to find all the constraints on all properties for a Windchill type
Function to find the Driver Attributes for a given entity name and version
Function to get a pregenerated value (like Number) before an entity is created
Function to find all the constraints on all properties for a given entity name and version
Function to get a pregenerated value (like Number) before an entity is created
Function to find all the constraints for a property on a given entity name and version
Function to find all the constraints for a property on a Windchill type
The type that represents the OptionSetAssignableEntity
An abstract base type representing items that can be contained in an option pool.
The type that represents the OptionSet
The abstract base type for Choices
The abstract base type for Options
Complex type list item which represents OptionSet Assignable object and associated OptionSets.
Complex type item which represents Parts and associated VariantSpecifications.
Assigned expresion data (both composite definition and individual expression items)
Provides basic Options and Variants capabilities
General information about the Part selected for the replacement
Returns a version of the Alternate Part that can be used in place of the given Part in any assembly.
Returns the common attributes of the Alternate Part that can be used in place of the given Part in any assembly.
Returns the common attributes of the Part that can be replaced by the alternate.
This electrical part extends Parts entity
Returns a version of the substitute part that can be used in place of the given part in a particular part structure.
Returns the common attributes of the substitute part that can be used in place of the given part in a particular part structure.

Returns the part usage link in the part structure where the given part can be replaced by the substitute part. To see the identity of the assembly, refer to the to the navigations available from the entity, PartUse.

Returns the Part Alternate link and its attributes created between the given Part and an alternate. To see the identity of the alternate Part, refer to the navigations available from the entity, PartAlternateLink.

Returns the Part Substitute link and its attributes created to a part that can replace the given part only in a particular part structure. To see the identity of the substitute part and the assembly, refer to the navigations available from the entity, PartSubstituteLink
General information about the Vendor Part selected for the replacement
General information about the Manufacturer Part selected for the replacement
General information about the Supplier Part selected for the replacement
Item of a parts list with an aggregate quantity of a part in a BOM.
Cached Navigation Criteria that is cached in a server-side cache manager
Provides information about what choices are selected in an Option Filter
EPMDocPromotionNoticeConfigSpec. Maps to Promotion Request in MSR
EPMDocStandardConfigSpec. Maps to Latest in MSR
A filter for a structure which changes as a result of making configuration selections.
EPMDocBaselineConfigSpec. Maps to Baseline in MSR
UsesPathFilter is a type of filter that can be used to provide a path filter on a CAD Document structure.
EPMDocAsStoredConfigSpec. Maps to AsStored in MSR
Link from the given image CAD Document to the synchronized version of the source
Used to for Windchill Representation Hyperlink.
function to get supported WVS features
A bound function to download the .zip file (pvz file) that can be opened by CreoView.
A bound function to get download URL for CreoView Dynamic Structure Representation
A bound function to download the .zip file for a specific fidelity(pvz file) that can be opened by CreoView.
A bound function to return available Fidelities.
A bound function to get download URL for CreoView Dynamic Structure Representation
This is complex type used to hold Sourcing status information
This is complex type used in other complex type named PreferenceData. this is used to hold Sourcing context information
Used only to configure OEMPartSourcingStatus property on Part entity. This hold the data in which sourcing context what is the sourcing status of the OEMPart object
Effectivity is the planned date, lot, or serial number at which old versions of the object are replaced with new versions in production.
General information about the Part selected for the context of an Effectivity
The type that represents the EffectivityManagedEntity
Complex type list item which represents Effectivity Managed object and associated Effectivities.
Describes a single preference for a xliff document.
A list of XliffPreferences for xliff document creation.
Function to get preferences for xliff document creation
Captures change request affected links information.
Affected object link between Change Issue and Changeable
Affected object link between Change Task and Changeable
Complex type list item which represents Pending Effectivity Managed object and associated Pending Effectivities.
Gets the valid change link entity type name for affected or resulting or hanging links as per relationship constraint.
